methods.description: Method for determining cave air and water temperatures and CO2 concentration in cave air.

steps.description: Cave air and water temperatures were determined using a GMH-3710 type Pt-100 digital thermometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure cave air and water temperatures using a digital thermometer

steps.description: CO2 concentration in cave air at 150 cm from the ground was measured.
steps.searchable_summary: measure CO2 concentration in cave air

methods.description: Optical microscopic analyses of stalagmite samples using crossed-polarized transmission light.

steps.description: Optical microscopic analyses were done in crossed-polarized transmission light using a Nikon Eclipse E600 POL optical microscope on polished thin sections.
steps.searchable_summary: perform optical microscopic analysis on thin sections
inputs: Nikon Eclipse E600 POL optical microscope

methods.description: Sample preparation and analysis for carbon isotope ratios using accelerator mass spectrometry.

steps.description: Sample preparation for accelerator mass spectrometry analyses were conducted following standard procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare samples for accelerator mass spectrometry

steps.description: The 14C/12C and 13C/12C ratios were measured by the Environ MICADAS 14C facility.
steps.searchable_summary: measure carbon isotope ratios using mass spectrometry

methods.description: Determination of stable carbon and oxygen isotope compositions in calcite powder.

steps.description: Stable carbon and oxygen isotope compositions were determined on calcite powder using a Thermo Finnigan delta plus XP continuous flow isotope ratio mass spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: determine stable isotope compositions using mass spectrometer
inputs: Thermo Finnigan delta plus XP mass spectrometer

methods.description: Measurement of trace element concentrations in powdered samples using mass spectrometry.

steps.description: About 10 mg of powdered sample was weighed into high purity 15 mL polypropylene centrifuge vials and dissolved in nitric acid.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare powdered samples for trace element analysis

steps.description: The analysis was carried out using an Element 2 inductively coupled plasma sector field mass spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze trace element concentrations using mass spectrometer

methods.description: Analysis of gridded climate data for the Carpathian region and global data sets for proxy-climate comparison.

steps.description: Gridded climate data from CARPATCLIM and CRU TS3.23 were used to avoid data gaps and inhomogeneities.
steps.searchable_summary: fetch gridded climate data from CARPATCLIM and CRU TS3.23

steps.description: Monthly mean temperature and precipitation totals were extracted for the grid cells covering the Baradla site.
steps.searchable_summary: extract temperature and precipitation data for specific grid cells

steps.description: Annual and seasonal averages were calculated from the extracted data.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate annual and seasonal averages from climate data
